name: Blitzkuchen Mit Apfeln (Apple Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the apples and cut them in half, removing the core.
2. Make decorative lengthwise slits in each apple about 1/2-inch deep.
3. Sprinkle with lemon juice and sugar; set aside.
4. Cream together butter and 3 tablespoons of sugar until smooth.
5. Add one egg yolk at a time to the mixture, mixing well after each addition.
6. Stir in the remaining egg yolk and lemon juice with grated peel.
7. Sift baking powder and flour into the batter; mix gently.
8. Gradually stir in milk and rum.
9. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
10. Gently fold the beaten whites into the batter.
11. Grease a springform pan with vegetable oil.
12. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and arrange apple halves on top.
13. Brush the apples with oil.
14. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
15. Remove from pan and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar before serving.
